context: Tests whether the agent implements the payment run module following skill conventions: 10-day discount look-ahead horizon, sorting by discount value descending, inclusion of discount-eligible invoices alongside due invoices, separate discount_cents on payment records, atomic transaction for payment run creation, approved-only invoice selection, weekly cadence recommendation, remittance advice to vendors, segregation of duties, and bank account change verification.

checklist.name: 10-day discount horizon
checklist.description: Early payment opportunity lookup uses a 10-day look-ahead window (not 7, not 14) when filtering invoices with expiring discounts

checklist.name: Discount sort order
checklist.description: Discount opportunities are sorted by discount value descending (highest savings first, not by deadline or invoice date)

checklist.name: Discount invoices included
checklist.description: Payment run includes both (a) invoices due by run date AND (b) invoices with expiring discounts not yet at due date, merged without duplicates

checklist.name: Approved-only filter
checklist.description: Payment run query filters for invoices with status='approved' only — does NOT include invoices in 'processing', 'pending_approval', 'disputed', or other non-approved states

checklist.name: Discount cents separated
checklist.description: Each payment record stores discount_cents separately from the net amount_cents (discount is not simply subtracted without being recorded)

checklist.name: Atomic transaction
checklist.description: Payment run creation (run record + payment records + invoice status updates to 'scheduled') executes inside a single database transaction

checklist.name: Vendor discount fields
checklist.description: Discount rate and discount window days are read from vendor record fields (e.g., early_discount_rate, early_discount_days) rather than parsed from invoice notes or terms text

checklist.name: Segregation of duties
checklist.description: Design notes or code comments explicitly state that the invoice approver and payment run initiator must be different roles/users; OR the code enforces this check programmatically

checklist.name: Bank change verification
checklist.description: Invoices from vendors whose bank account was changed recently (within ~7 days) are flagged for manual verification and excluded from the automated payment batch

checklist.name: Remittance advice sent
checklist.description: The vendor notification function sends a remittance listing each invoice number and the amount paid, not just a generic payment confirmation

checklist.name: Weekly cadence mentioned
checklist.description: Design notes or code comments recommend or implement a fixed weekly payment cadence (not ad-hoc or daily runs)

checklist.name: Discount window expiry check
checklist.description: Discount opportunities skip invoices where the discount deadline has already passed (discountDeadline < today is excluded)
